title: Malaysian Vegan Noodle Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy vegan noodle dish inspired by Malaysian cuisine. This recipe is quick and easy to make, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: vegan oil
ingredients.notes: such as coconut or canola oil

instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat the vegan oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fermented bean paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the onion, garlic, and bell pepper. Cook for 3-4 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Add the cooked noodles, vegan soy sauce, sugar, and chili flakes (if using). Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until everything is well combined.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions (if desired).
